title: Alternate 3D Mace
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SsVQnnWk/images/e261ec6554b656bff57d10feb018a4ea733ce0a7.png) **Works without mods!** The bonk machine has been upgraded to 3D!! Resource pack contains only the mace textures, so it should work with any other resource pack as long as you make sure this is on top in the resource pack menu! anyway enjoy :] please report any issues you have on the website! --- please do not redistribute without my consent (feel free to use in modrinth or curseforge modpacks though!)
if you make variations from this please credit me :]
